ogTitle: Staughton Vale vs Stavely: Climate Safety

heading: Staughton Vale vs Stavely — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Staughton Vale, Victoria and Stavely, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Stavely has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Staughton Vale (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Staughton Vale or Stavely safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Staughton Vale has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Stavely scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Staughton Vale scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Stavely scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Staughton Vale or Stavely?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Stavely has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
